name: ferro-ta-wasm
description: WebAssembly bindings for ferro-ta technical analysis indicators

scripts.build: npm run build:node && npm run build:web
scripts.build:node: wasm-pack build --target nodejs --out-dir node && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('node/.gitignore', { force: true }); require('fs').rmSync('node/package.json', { force: true });"
scripts.build:web: wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir web && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('web/.gitignore', { force: true }); require('fs').rmSync('web/package.json', { force: true });"
